findings.issue: File type validation relies solely on extension, allowing double-extension bypass
findings.evidence_span: upload_service.py: save_upload() accepts report.pdf.jpg when filename.endswith('.jpg')
findings.recommended_fix: Implement magic byte (MIME) validation instead of relying only on the file extension; reject files whose magic bytes do not match the expected type.

findings.issue: Audit log retention days is not configured
findings.recommended_fix: Set a non‑empty value for audit_log_retention_days (e.g., 365) to enforce log rotation and compliance requirements.
